overrides.text: From Meredith Needham (ts=1775233560.409249): <@U01511MEQ90> <@U014U9WMK2A> Navy STTR was submitted a long with the invoice. SBIR Magnetometer has the kick-off and FWA Certification due on April 14th. Will review Asana due dates to make sure it's all updated

overrides.author: Maciej
overrides.text: From Maciej (ts=1777067599.182059): <@U0AQE94HJUT> our highest priority projects right now are: (1) S3 IRAD with a targeted delivery of end of May for the UMES S3, (2) S0-VTOL with two deliveries for ERAU and Barbados, (3) Closing out EMASS, (4) By-Lite Mustang, and (5) Initial tasks on the SBIR Magnetometer project. How are we looking on overdue tasks for those?
